notes: Core 1.41.0 creates one unified Comments section.
Photo comments, replies and reactions are folded into the Comments section and hidden from the top-level main menu.
Video and files remain excluded from comments.
Core 1.42.5 fills the final Moderation function tree: scope, queue, reports, rules, stop-words, links, photo, spam/flood, users, bot rights, actions, logs and modes.
Core 1.42.6 fixes moderation danger button wording so delete and block buttons explicitly mention confirmation and stay two-step.
Core 1.43.0 fills the Stats function tree: overview, channels, posts, comments, CTA buttons, lead magnets, traffic sources, referral links, funnel, costs, top posts, export and data freshness.
Referral links use /r/:code: АдминКИТ records an exact click and redirects to MAX or configured target URL.
Stats attribution is honest: exact clicks/starts/callbacks/lead claims are separated from probable subscriptions after click.
Without a ref-code from MAX, AdminKit does not promise an exact advertising source for the subscription.
Stress-test V11 wraps V10 and checks full stats/referral attribution path.
